title: Library of Congress Primary Source Sets
description: A source card for Library of Congress classroom materials and primary-source sets.

pages.text: Library of Congress classroom materials help teachers and students work with primary sources. Useful paths include primary-source sets, lesson plans, presentations, Chronicling America, Everyday Mysteries, research guides, and Free to Use and Reuse sets.

This source belongs in the history and primary-source shelf because it supports document analysis, sourcing, context, corroboration, and evidence-based argument. Rights note: the Library does not own every item in its collections, so item-level copyright and use restrictions must be checked.
